cases.input: Orchestrate discovery for support modernization with input analysis, stakeholder map, requirements, architecture, risks, and report.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces acyclic dependency graph, phases, gates, deliverable register, blockers, validation, and risks.

cases.input: Run stakeholder analysis and current-state review in parallel after intake.
cases.expected_behavior: Allows parallelism only when no dependency edge conflicts.

cases.input: Requirements gate is blocked because input-analysis has unresolved contradictions.
cases.expected_behavior: Reports blocked pipeline with blocker owner, next action, and no downstream ready status.

cases.input: Architecture depends on requirements and requirements depend on architecture.
cases.expected_behavior: Detects dependency cycle and blocks sequencing.

cases.input: Move from discovery to architecture without specifying G2 criteria.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks phase transition until gate criteria exist.

cases.input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because no discovery pipeline orchestration is requested.

cases.input: Plan the sequence of discovery work and approval checkpoints for this engagement.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates even without exact trigger phrase because sequencing and checkpoints imply discovery orchestration.

cases.input: Set up discovery orchestration, but no docs are available yet.
cases.expected_behavior: Requests minimum viable artifacts and emits blocked starter packet rather than inventing deliverables.

cases.input: Coordinate a discovery pipeline with 30 skills and multiple gates.
cases.expected_behavior: Keeps output bounded by summarizing repeated low-risk skills and expanding gates, blockers, dependencies, and high-risk deliverables.
